items.title: Pattern Recognition and Machine Learning (Bishop)
items.author: Christopher M. Bishop
items.note: Chapter on mixture models and clustering; clear treatment of unsupervised structure learning.

items.title: The Elements of Statistical Learning
items.author: Hastie, Tibshirani, Friedman
items.note: Authoritative coverage of unsupervised methods including clustering and principal components.

items.title: scikit-learn Unsupervised learning guide
items.author: scikit-learn developers
items.note: Practical overview of clustering, decomposition, and anomaly detection APIs in Python.
